word: H2141 - זָכַךְ - zâkak - zaw-kak' - Be clean

sections.paragraph:
Original: זכך

Transliteration: zâkak

Phonetic: zaw-kak'

BDB Definition:

  1. to be pure, be bright, be clean, be bright, clean
    1. (Qal)
      1. to be bright, be shining
      2. to be clean, be pure
    2. (Hiphil) to cleanse, make cleanse, make clean

Origin: a primitive root [compare H2135]

TWOT entry: 550

Part(s) of speech: Verb
